user_query: I am hosting a dinner party and want to ensure it is a healthy and sustainable event. Can you provide me with some nutritious recipes and ingredient suggestions? Additionally, we need information on the carbon footprint of the ingredients used in the recipes. Moreover, could you suggest some eco-friendly alternatives for party decorations?

TaskList.description: Gather nutritious recipes suitable for a dinner party.
Compile a list of ingredients for the selected recipes.
Calculate the carbon footprint of each ingredient.
Research eco-friendly alternatives for party decorations.
